title: Genes_DNA_Persistence
author: Noel, Hannah
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These data were collected as part of a surface-level human decomposition study to better understand the persistence of human mitochondrial and nuclear DNA in soil. These data include quantitative PCR information and envrionemntal data.
steps_raw: These data were collected as part of a surface-level human decomposition study to better understand the persistence of human mitochondrial and nuclear DNA in soil. These data include quantitative PCR information and envrionemntal data.
